ham.subject: GitHub Issue #4526 Resolved – Documentation Updated
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I wanted to let you know that Issue #4526 has been successfully addressed. The core bug in the authentication module has been fixed, and the related documentation has been updated to reflect the new flow.

Key points:
- The API endpoint now correctly returns a 200 status for valid tokens.
- Updated README includes the new authentication steps.
- Regression tests added to confirm the fix.

Please pull the latest changes and run the test suite. Let me know if you run into any issues.

Thanks for your patience and collaboration.

Best regards,
Jane Doe
Software Engineer

spam.subject: Urgent: Income Tax Department Refund Verification Required
spam.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Our records indicate that you are eligible for an Income Tax Department refund of $12,345.67. To process this refund, the Department requires immediate verification of your personal details.

Please click on the secure link below to confirm your information:

<URL>

Failure to comply within 48 hours will result in the suspension of your refund claim. The Department takes all security measures to protect your data, and this verification step is mandatory.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Income Tax Department
Customer Service
